items.title_en: OpenAI trial live updates: Musk says Tesla, SpaceX and X are 'socially beneficial'

items.desc_en: Elon Musk sued OpenAI, Sam Altman and Greg Brockman in 2024, claiming they reneged on their promise to keep the artificial intelligence lab a nonprofit.
items.desc_zh: 埃隆·马斯克 (Elon Musk) 于 2024 年起诉 OpenAI、山姆·奥尔特曼 (Sam Altman) 和格雷格·布罗克曼 (Greg Brockman)，声称他们违背了让人工智能实验室保持非营利性的承诺。

items.title_en: Trump taps Nicole Saphier for surgeon general after pulling Casey Means nomination

items.desc_en: Means' nomination had stalled in the Senate over concerns about her controversial stances on vaccines, birth control, pesticides and psychedelics.

items.desc_en: Axios reported that US Central Command has prepared a plan for a wave of "short and powerful" strikes on Iran.
items.desc_zh: Axios报道称，美国中央司令部已准备好对伊朗进行一波“短暂而有力”的打击的计划。

items.title_en: Trump says US studying troop cuts in Germany, after Merz criticises war
items.title_zh: 默茨批评战争后，特朗普表示美国正在研究削减驻德部队
items.desc_en: His remarks come after the German chancellor criticised the US approach to the war in Iran.
items.desc_zh: 在他发表上述言论之前，德国总理批评了美国对伊朗战争的态度。

items.title_en: Royal commission into Bondi shooting says gun reform should be prioritised
items.title_zh: 邦迪枪击事件皇家委员会表示应优先考虑枪支改革
items.desc_en: An interim report also says policing arrangements for Jewish holidays should be extended to other 'high-risk' events.
items.desc_zh: 一份临时报告还表示，犹太节日的治安安排应扩大到其他“高风险”活动。

items.title_en: US singer D4vd bought tools online to dispose of girl's body, prosecutors allege
items.title_zh: 检察官指控美国歌手 D4vd 在网上购买工具处理女孩尸体
items.desc_en: The Tiktok star's attorneys have maintained his innocence and vowed to "vigorously defend" him.
items.desc_zh: 这位抖音明星的律师坚称他无罪，并誓言“大力捍卫”他。

items.title_en: US charges Mexican governor and other leaders with aiding drug cartel
items.title_zh: 美国指控墨西哥州长和其他领导人协助贩毒集团
items.desc_en: The governor of Sinaloa, Rúben Rocha Moya, hails from the same party as the president of Mexico.
items.desc_zh: 锡那罗亚州州长鲁本·罗查·莫亚与墨西哥总统来自同一党派。

items.title_en: 'I did not expect it': Kenya's Sabastian Sawe welcomed home with jubilant celebrations

items.desc_en: The first man to run a marathon in under two hours in a competitive race received a hero's welcome from supporters and family when he arrived home.
items.desc_zh: 第一个在竞技比赛中在两小时内跑完马拉松的人回到家时受到了支持者和家人英雄般的欢迎。

items.title_en: Musk accuses OpenAI lawyer of trying to 'trick' him in combative testimony

items.desc_en: Elon Musk was cross-examined on the third day of the trial over his lawsuit against Sam Altman and OpenAI.
